name: @pryzm/component-editor
description: PRYZM 2 — Family Creator standalone SPA. The Revit-Family-Editor analogue: 2D parametric profile sketcher → constraint solver → 3D extrude/sweep/loft/revolve → parameter table → typed authoring of `.pryzm-family` artefacts. Full rewrite plan: docs/00_NEW_ARCHITECTURE/phases/PHASE-3B-FAMILY-CREATOR-REWRITE-PLAN.md.  Sprint roadmap: S52 (scaffold + real planegcs solver + extrude) → S53 (sketch tools + sweep/loft/revolve) → S54 (AI host bridge + batch undo) → S55 (parameter table + IFC binding + .pryzm-family v1) → S56 (main-editor load/place/bake) → S57 (versioning + migrations) → S58 (standalone deploy + a11y + e2e) → S59 (marketplace publish).
